Online Professional Development for K-12 Teachers Flexible, Self-Paced Online PD Courses for Teachers — Earn Accredited Credits for Salary Advancement & Recertification ENROLL NOW 19,047 VERIFIED EVALUATIONS What Teachers Say About CE Credits Online Read all reviews → 95.5% Would recommend to colleagues 98.1% Feel confident applying new strategies 97.0% Found courses relevant to their practice 97.6% Found the platform easy to navigate I will use the learned strategies every day in my practice. I have a much better understanding of HIB and how I can prevent it in my school building. Ashley W. Creating School Environments Free from Harassment, Intimidation & Bullying I absolutely loved this course! It was incredibly helpful, offering strategies that apply to any type of student. I've made copies of all the materials and plan to share the information with my special education department. Atena J. Differentiating Instruction in the 21st Century Classroom Everything! As a special education teacher classroom management can be difficult â€” but I feel like I've gained so many resources! Atia R. Classroom and Behavior Management Strategies that Work I found the evidence-based strategies I took away from this course incredibly valuable. I loved the videos and resources that were shared throughout. Evdokia B. Autism Advocate: Supporting Students with ASD What I found most useful is learning how to teach reading strategies more directly and how to combine different language skills in one lesson. Having clear goals and planning activities that build on each other helps me track how my students are doing and adjust my teaching. Luke V. ELL Reading: Teaching Strategies for K-12 I have so many tangible mindfulness practices to bring to my classroom that support all areas of 21st century skills and the social emotional competency wheel. Talia G. Developing Students' Mindfulness Practice ← → Get the Credits You Need Graduate-Level Professional Development Credits P Credits and A+ Credits for NYC DOE Teachers Salary Points for LAUSD Teachers Lane Credits for Chicago Public Schools CPE Hours for Texas Teachers Clock Hours for Washington State Teachers UNIVERSITY PARTNERS University Partners CE Credits Online is committed to providing the highest quality courses at the very best price. To fulfill this commitment we create courses that meet the high standards and comply with the academic policies of our post-baccalaureate credit providers SEE UNIVERSITY REQUIREMENTS FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS Have Questions? There's lots to know about CE Credits Online and the courses we offer to develop your professional qualifications. Here are the most common questions we get asked. VIEW FAQ'S SUBSCRIBE AND SAVE Subscribe to our Newsletter Subscribe to receive discounts and our newsletter. SIGN UP ABOUT What is CE Credits Online? 94% OF OVER 20,000 EDUCATORS STATE THEY WOULD TAKE ANOTHER CE CREDITS ONLINE COURSE CE Credits Online, a dba of The Riesling Group, Inc., has been creating and providing graduate-level, professional development courses for K-12 educators since 2001. For over 15 years we have offered our professional development courses for teachers in hundreds of districts nationwide, including LAUSD, NYC, and Chicago Public Schools. All CE Credits Online courses are eligible for graduate-level university credits from regionally accredited universities. CE Credits Online creates timely, relevant and research-based courses that have an immediate impact in the classroom. We have courses ranging from 21st Century teaching practices (differentiation, technology implementation), supporting exceptional learners (ELLs and Special Needs students), and teacher practices (classroom management, identifying and preventing bullying, etc.). All courses are asynchronous, work-at-your-own-pace and have multiple assessments, opportunities to interact with other participants and one-on-one feedback from moderators with Masters or better degrees in education. It’s one of the most powerful tools educators have to strengthen their practice, advance their careers, and create meaningful change in their classrooms. In... Here’s a simple checklist to help teachers wrap up the year... children.headline: What Teachers Say About CE Credits Online
body: I will use the learned strategies every day in my practice. I have a much better understanding of HIB and how I can prevent it in my school building.

I absolutely loved this course! It was incredibly helpful, offering strategies that apply to any type of student. I've made copies of all the materials and plan to share the information with my special education department.
Everything! As a special education teacher classroom management can be difficult â€” but I feel like I've gained so many resources!
I found the evidence-based strategies I took away from this course incredibly valuable. I loved the videos and resources that were shared throughout.

What I found most useful is learning how to teach reading strategies more directly and how to combine different language skills in one lesson. Having clear goals and planning activities that build on each other helps me track how my students are doing and adjust my teaching.
I have so many tangible mindfulness practices to bring to my classroom that support all areas of 21st century skills and the social emotional competency wheel.

children.headline: ABOUT
body: CE Credits Online, a dba of The Riesling Group, Inc., has been creating and providing graduate-level, professional development courses for K-12 educators since 2001. For over 15 years we have offered our professional development courses for teachers in hundreds of districts nationwide, including LAUSD, NYC, and Chicago Public Schools. All CE Credits Online courses are eligible for graduate-level university credits from regionally accredited universities.

CE Credits Online creates timely, relevant and research-based courses that have an immediate impact in the classroom. We have courses ranging from 21st Century teaching practices (differentiation, technology implementation), supporting exceptional learners (ELLs and Special Needs students), and teacher practices (classroom management, identifying and preventing bullying, etc.). All courses are asynchronous, work-at-your-own-pace and have multiple assessments, opportunities to interact with other participants and one-on-one feedback from moderators with Masters or better degrees in education.

CE CREDITS ONLINE 23224 NE 156th Pl. Woodinville, WA 98077 Phone: 425.788.7275 support@cecreditsonline.org HAVE QUESTIONS? You can contact CE Credits Online by submitting a request from your Student Homepage under Customer Service which is in the upper right corner of your screen. You may also email us at support@cecreditsonline.org or call our customer service line at 425.788.7275 Ext. 104. Our office hours are Monday-Friday 8:00AM-5:00PM PST. We look forward to hearing from you!
